name: oxe-cc
description: OXE — spec-driven workflows for Cursor and GitHub Copilot (install via npx)

scripts.test: node --test tests/install.test.cjs tests/oxe-project-health.test.cjs tests/oxe-sdk.test.cjs tests/oxe-manifest.test.cjs tests/oxe-agent-install.test.cjs tests/oxe-install-resolve-full.test.cjs tests/oxe-health-extended.test.cjs tests/oxe-workflows-edge.test.cjs tests/oxe-sdk-edge.test.cjs tests/oxe-cli-edge.test.cjs tests/oxe-scripts.test.cjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: node scripts/sync-cursor-from-prompts.cjs && npm test && npm run scan:assets && node bin/oxe-cc.js --version
